news.t: Invesco takes the regulatory steps to expand its ETF business in Japan

holdings.infoBox: QQQS is an equity ETF with a total of 202 individual holdings. The top holdings are MaxLinear stock at 2.23%, Bandwidth at 1.56%, Aehr Test Systems at 1.36%, AXT, Inc. at 1.28%, and Veeco Instruments at 1.19%.

overview.description: The Invesco NASDAQ Future Gen 200 ETF (QQQS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq Innovators Completion Cap index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 200 NASDAQ-listed stocks selected based on the value of their patent portfolios. The portfolio excludes the largest 200 stocks listed on NASDAQ. QQQS was launched on Oct 13, 2022 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Invesco takes the regulatory steps to expand its ETF business in Japan
data.text: ATLANTA , June 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Capital Management LLC, an investment adviser managing an extensive family of exchange-traded funds (ETFs), announced today that our global ETF business...
